{{Quote|Me? I'm, I'm -- I forget how old. When was the Trade Federation War? I retired not long after that. Retired to Manda with my wife, Pookie, and we had a miniature bantha named Nuke. Good old Nuke. I never should have outlived them.|Ebenn Q3 Baobab|<ref name="SWG:AED">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=static|Ebenn Q3 Baobab|Naboo}}</ref>}}
'''Nuke''' was the name of the pet miniature [[Dwarf bantha/Legends|dwarf bantha]] owned by [[Pookie Baobab|Pookie]] and [[Ebenn Q3 Baobab/Legends|Ebenn Q3 Baobab]].
